name: tianshu
description: An open AI agent platform with a sidecar browser. Built in public.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/plugin-sdk && npm run build:plugins && npm run sync:plugins && node scripts/dev-builtins.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/plugin-sdk && npm run build:plugins && npm run sync:plugins && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/plugin-sdk && npm run test:plugins && npm run sync:plugins && npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/plugin-sdk/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node scripts/typecheck-plugins.mjs && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
